summary: Fresh audit of monitor.py commit 8e4bf9b confirms structural findings but corrects factual errors. Key fixes: (1) Live-fetch WIN list corrected from 6 to 4 (WIN-005/027 are hardcoded, not live_fetch). (2) Stratification fixed: WIN-045/046/049 are hardcoded tidal domains, not unmonitored. (3) Added direct code quotes from monitor.py as evidence. (4) Framing shifted from tag-based claims to code-grounded analysis. (5) 39 monitoring domains for 70 WINs — coverage gap is structural. Replacement HTML uses template vars for counts, hardcodes only specific code examples that are stable.
